title: Kraken's tokenized stocks to offer foreign retail IPO access. In time for SpaceX?
message_html: Kraken's tokenized stocks to offer foreign retail IPO access. In time for SpaceX? ...
snippet: Payward, the parent of the Kraken crypto exchange and owner of xStocks, has announced the launch of its IPO platform enabling access to stocks at the IPO price (rather than the secondary market price) to foreign retail investors. xStocks offers tokenized stocks which are structured loan notes, backe
